title: Essar Renewables signs MOU with Government of Maharashtra to develop 2GW of Renewable Energy for its green mobility initiative
content: Essar Renewables Ltd (ERL) has signed an MoU with the Government of Maharashtra at WEF Davos, committing â‚¹8,000 crore to develop 2 GW of renewable energy capacity for green mobility, particularly supporting EV truck charging for Blue Energy Motors and Greenline. The initiative, beginning FY 2026-27, will create over 2,000 jobs and contribute to Maharashtra's green energy transition. ERL aims to surpass 8 GW renewable capacity within five years, solidifying its position as a leader in Indiaâ€™s sustainable energy sector.
author: Analysts Account
